<游戏简介>&二十四年前，我促成了科勒斯和她的神话，而我到底是谁，前世今身，奈何: <Gioi thieu>&24 nam truoc, toi da tao nen than thoai cua Koles va co ay. Toi la ai? 24 nam sau, toi ke lai cau chuyen ve Koles va Ailen trong ky uc. Toi van la kiem si ay.&&<Dieu khien>&Phim trai/4:&Sang trai;&Phim phai/6:&Sang phai;&Phim len/2:&Di len;&Phim xuong/8:&Di xuong;&Nhan doi trai/4:&Luot trai;&Nhan doi phai/6:&Luot phai;&Nhan doi len/2:&Luot len;&Nhan doi xuong/8:&Luot xuong;&1:Skill1; 3:Skill2; 5:ATK/Noi chuyen; 7:Skill3; 9:Skill4 (can nang bang diem Skill); Goi y: Chan bang 0 thanh cong, bam 5 de phan kich; dung tot co the qua man khong mat mau.&*: Mau; #: Mana;&Soft trai: OK/Menu game;&Soft phai: Huy/Ve/Menu NV;&
